pr.title: Record: Split-LR + BigramHash(2816x160) + Full GPTQ + Brotli — val_bpb 1.1105 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Combines split early/late LRs, widened BigramHash, sigmoid-gated U-Net skips, and soft-round GPTQ with Brotli/minified packaging.
techniques: Split-LR (0.025/0.030) schedule for early vs late layers
BigramHash 2816×160 paired with sigmoid-gated U-Net skips
Soft-round GPTQ training plus Brotli+byte-shuffle compression and code minification
